scripts.build:workspaces: npm run build --workspace @indio/contracts && npm run build --workspace @indio/server && npm run build --workspace @indio/pwa
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @indio/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @indio/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @indio/pwa
scripts.dev:server-pwa: concurrently -n server,pwa -c green,blue "npm run dev --workspace @indio/server" "npm run dev --workspace @indio/pwa"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
